strictRules: Resend API key and webhook secret are server-only runtime values.
The inbound webhook uses the raw body and Svix signature headers before processing.
Admin inbox UI never renders raw inbound or template HTML.
Internal private notes are internal-only and blocked from the customer reply composer.
Email copy is sourced from the dedicated JSON template catalog.
Template placeholders must be declared as required variables and must render through the catalog renderer.
Payment, refund, and Premium-access replies must record message, delivery, and status audit events.
Support email must not send new astrology predictions or fatalistic claims.
Admin replies must carry idempotency keys so duplicate submits do not create duplicate customer emails.
